#  Change the Status of an RFI (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * You can close an RFI whether or not it has any responses.  
_Note:_ After you close an RFI, you are NOT permitted to add questions or responses.
    * If you need to reopen an RFI, you can change its status back to **Open**.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the RFI you want to change the status of. 
#####  Tip
Before you change the status of the RFI, you can edit the **Distribution List** to add one or more users from the company in the **Responsible Contractor** field. See [Edit an RFI (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/edit-an-rfi-ios). If the RFI email settings for the project are configured to send emails to users on an RFI's **Distribution List** when an RFI is closed or reopened, adding those users to the **Distribution List** will ensure they receive an email notification when the RFI is closed or reopened. See [When does the RFIs tool send email notifications?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-does-the-rfis-tool-send-email-notifications)
  3. Tap the status drop-down menu.  
![Change Rfi Status Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f2ce214e66216b0135e90c1bd888de79/7614171acacdc2213e86c6552c7f86b5/change-rfi-status-ios.png?fm=webp)
  4. In the **Change Status** window, tap **Closed** or **Open**.  
The status change is automatically saved and emails are sent according to the project's settings. See [When does the RFIs tool send email notifications?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-does-the-rfis-tool-send-email-notifications)


## See Also
  * [RFIs (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/permissions)
  * [Create a Change Event from an RFI (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-an-rfi-ios)
  * [Which Procore tools can I use to create a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-can-i-use-to-create-a-change-event)
title: Change the Status of an RFI (iOS)
description: How to close an RFI using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
